name: Roaster
author: YourName
description: AI-powered roast bot that syncs channel messages and generates personalized roasts, battles, and user comparisons using multiple AI providers (Groq, OpenAI, NVIDIA, Moonshot, DeepSeek, Z-AI, OpenRouter). Includes message history tracking, per-guild settings, opt-out system, and a full settings UI.
install_msg: Thanks for installing RoastMaster! Use `[p]roast` to get started, or `[p]roasterset` to configure per-guild settings.
short: AI-powered roast bot with message sync and multi-provider support
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs, usernames, and message content for the purpose of generating AI roasts. Users can opt out with [p]optout, which excludes their messages from being used for roasts. All message data is stored locally in the bot operator's SQLite database.
